title: Mixed Worlds Landscape

description.text: A new world has been created. This time in a beautiful sun flooded dining room of an elegant home, high in the mountains surrounded by snow and incredible views.

Totally personal and unique - this wall painting tells a family story and combines all their favourite places. Bagan, Bauhina blossoms, mangos, monkeys, sleeping Buddhas, and the alps all around…this is a mix of worlds where they feel totally at home and can recall and share their most cherished memories.

location: Dining Room. Private Home. Hinterthal, Austria
